tasks.subject: Task 1: Cache finished_at + size_bytes at terminal transitions
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Stamp finished_at (once) + size_bytes into job_data before all 4 terminal set_json calls (P1).

```json:metadata
{"phase":"P1","files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_auto_stash_fields.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_auto_stash_fields.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["_stamp_terminal_fields helper","called at 4 sites before set_json","finished_at idempotent","fail-open"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: /results stashed branch (inline unstash)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** get_results_archive detects stashed_at, unstashes inline, re-reads job_info, serves; propagate unstash failure (P1).

```json:metadata
{"phase":"P1","files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_auto_stash_results.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_auto_stash_results.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["stashed branch before archived branch","unstash then re-read job_info","propagate 502/504"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Record downloaded_at on /results serve
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /results endpoint persists downloaded_at (stream-start) before returning; fail-open (P1).

```json:metadata
{"phase":"P1","files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/router/crawler.py","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_auto_stash_downloaded_at.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_auto_stash_downloaded_at.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["_record_downloaded_at helper","called after archive-exists check","fail-open"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Update-mode restore handles stashed previous crawl
tasks.description:
**Goal:** _restore_previous_crawl routes stashed->unstash_crawl, archived->_restore_archived_crawl; wire into start_crawl with rollback (P1).

```json:metadata
{"phase":"P1","files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_auto_stash_update_restore.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_auto_stash_update_restore.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["stashed->unstash_crawl","archived->_restore_archived_crawl","rollback+503 on failure"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Bump BO /results call timeout (Hellopro PHP)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** sendRequest gains $timeout=300 forwarded to call_api_hellopro; two /results callers pass 900 (P1, Hellopro repo).

```json:metadata
{"phase":"P1","repo":"Hellopro","files":["BO/admin/repertoire_test/moulinettes_interne/scrapping_produit_ia/fonctions/fonctions_scrapping.php"],"verifyCommand":"grep -n sendRequest( fonctions_scrapping.php","acceptanceCriteria":["sendRequest $timeout param","two /results calls pass 900","other callers unchanged"]}
```

tasks.description:

tasks.subject: Task 7: Eligibility predicate _is_stash_eligible
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure (bool,reason) predicate: grace/timeout; gate terminal+unstashed+non-archived; fail-open on bad timestamps (P2).

```json:metadata
{"phase":"P2","files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_auto_stash_eligibility.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_auto_stash_eligibility.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["grace/timeout branches","terminal gate","fail-open"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Wire auto-stash sweep into _reconcile_locked
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Collect candidates in scan; select grace/timeout + disk-pressure top-N (cap); dispatch via asyncio.create_task(_auto_stash_one); add _disk_used_pct/_select_stash_candidates/_auto_stash_one; gate AUTO_STASH_ENABLED (P2).

```json:metadata
{"phase":"P2","files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_auto_stash_sweep.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_auto_stash_sweep.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["gate on flag","select+cap","create_task dispatch","409 no-op"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: archive_crawl stashed branch drives move
tasks.description:
**Goal:** archive_crawl top branch: stashed_at -> _move_stash_to_archive (write .move-request, poll, _mark_as_archived, clear stashed_at), return archive_status=pending_upload; 502/504 errors (P3).

```json:metadata
{"phase":"P3","files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_auto_stash_archive_move.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_auto_stash_archive_move.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["stashed branch returns pending_upload","poll done/error","mark archived+clear stashed_at","502/504"]}
```
